description: Generic hierarchical tree component rendering ITreeNode<TKey> items with expand/collapse toggles, click-to-select labels, lazy loading spinners, and recursive child rendering.

parameters.name: OnNodeSelect
parameters.description: Fires when a tree node label is clicked.

parameters.name: OnNodeExpand
parameters.description: Fires when a tree node is expanded or collapsed.

examples.title: Tree with expand callback for lazy loading
